languages.text: "Ты выбрала жизнь". {n}Эоганн кивает.{/n} "Знания — малая плата за возможность продолжить свои труды".
"You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."
languages.original_text: "Ты выбрала жизнь". {n}Эоганн кивает.{/n} "Знания — малая плата за возможность продолжить свои труды".

traits.locale_text: "You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."
"You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."
"You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."
"You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."

languages.text: «Ha elegido la vida». {n}Eogunn asiente.{/n} «El conocimiento es un pequeño precio a pagar por la oportunidad de perseguir sus propios fines».
languages.original_text: "You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."

traits.locale_text: «Ha elegido la vida». {n}Eogunn asiente.{/n} «El conocimiento es un pequeño precio a pagar por la oportunidad de perseguir sus propios fines».

languages.text: “你选择了活下去。”{n}伊奥贡点了点头。{/n}“若能继续追求你的事业，知识也不过是微不足道的代价。”
languages.original_text: "You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."

traits.locale_text: “你选择了活下去。”{n}伊奥贡点了点头。{/n}“若能继续追求你的事业，知识也不过是微不足道的代价。”

languages.text: "Ihr habt Euch für das Leben entschieden." {n}Eogunn nickt.{/n} "Wissen ist ein geringer Preis für die Chance, Euer Werk zu vollenden."
languages.original_text: "You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt Euch für das Leben entschieden." {n}Eogunn nickt.{/n} "Wissen ist ein geringer Preis für die Chance, Euer Werk zu vollenden."

languages.text: « Vous avez choisi la vie, {n}songe Eogunn en hochant la tête.{/n} La connaissance est un faible prix à payer pour avoir la chance de poursuivre votre œuvre. »
languages.original_text: "You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez choisi la vie, {n}songe Eogunn en hochant la tête.{/n} La connaissance est un faible prix à payer pour avoir la chance de poursuivre votre œuvre. »

languages.text: "Sen yaşamayı seçtin." {n}Eogunn başını sallıyor.{/n} "İrfan, çalışmalarını sürdürme şansı için ödenen cüzi bir bedeldir."
languages.original_text: "You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."

traits.locale_text: "Sen yaşamayı seçtin." {n}Eogunn başını sallıyor.{/n} "İrfan, çalışmalarını sürdürme şansı için ödenen cüzi bir bedeldir."

languages.text: 「あなたは命を選んだ」{n}イオグンは頷く。{/n}「あなたの作品を追求するチャンスを得るために、知識はわずかな代償に過ぎない」
languages.original_text: "You have chosen life." {n}Eogunn nods.{/n} "Knowledge is but a meagre toll for the chance to pursue your works."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは命を選んだ」{n}イオグンは頷く。{/n}「あなたの作品を追求するチャンスを得るために、知識はわずかな代償に過ぎない」
